title: Tomato Toast
ingredients:
2 slices bread
1 tomato
1 tbsp olive oil
steps:
Toast the bread.
Slice the tomato.
Top toast with tomato and olive oil.

title: Garlic Rice
ingredients:
1 cup rice
2 cloves garlic
2 cups water
steps:
Rinse the rice.
Cook garlic in a pot.
Add rice and water and simmer until done.
